# thoth_billing_artifact (Data Source)

Reads one monthly billing artifact row (PDF/CSV links) for a specific year and month.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `month` (Number) Artifact month (1-12).
- `year` (Number) Artifact year (for example: 2026).

### Read-Only

- `response_json` (String) Monthly billing artifact payload as JSON.
